sectionTitle: Excuse Me. How Do You Get to Shida?

samples.pinyin: lǎogōng a, háizi huì zǒu la.
samples.en: Honey, our child can walk now.
samples.vi: Chồng ơi, con biết đi rồi nè.

samples.pinyin: nǐ zěnme zǒu de nàme màn?
samples.en: Why are you walking so slowly?
samples.vi: Sao mà cậu đi chậm thế?

items.en: someone; lit. a person on the street

samples.pinyin: lùrén rèxīn bāng wǒ zhǐ lù.
samples.en: A passerby kindly helped me with directions.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xiàng lùrén wènle shíjiān.
samples.en: I asked a passerby for the time.

samples.meaning: help; give a hand; lend a hand; do a favour; do a good turn
samples.pinyin: tā xūyào nǐ de bāngmáng.
samples.en: He needs your help.
samples.vi: Anh ấy cần sự giúp đỡ của bạn.

samples.meaning: help; give a hand; lend a hand; do a favour; do a good turn
samples.pinyin: tā lái bāngmáng bān dōngxi.
samples.en: He came to help move things.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đến giúp chuyển đồ.

items.en: to be lost, to have lost directions

samples.meaning: stray; get lost; lose one's way; lose one's bearings; go the wrong way; can't find one's way
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yǐ wánquán mílùle.
samples.en: We are completely lost.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi hoàn toàn lạc đường rồi.

samples.meaning: stray; get lost; lose one's way; lose one's bearings; go the wrong way; can't find one's way
samples.sentence: 我們在森林裡/裏迷路了。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen zài sēnlín lǐ mílùle.
samples.en: We are lost in the forest.
samples.vi: Chúng ta bị lạc đường trong rừng.

samples.pinyin: shàng yǒu fùmǔ, xià yǒu érnǚ.
samples.en: Above are parents, below are children.
samples.vi: Trên có cha mẹ, dưới có con cái.

samples.pinyin: shàng yǒu lǎobǎn, xià yǒu yuángōng.
samples.en: Above is the boss, below are employees.
samples.vi: Trên có sếp, dưới có nhân viên.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen zǒu cuòle lùkǒu.
samples.en: We took the wrong intersection.

samples.sentence: 她在路口遇到了老朋友。
samples.pinyin: tā zài lùkǒu yù dàole lǎo péngyǒu.
samples.en: She met an old friend at the intersection.

samples.pinyin: zhè duàn mùtou hěn jiēshi.
samples.en: This piece of wood is very solid.
samples.vi: Cái khúc gỗ này rất chắc chắn.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuan zhè liǎng duàn mùtou.
samples.en: I like these two pieces of wood.
samples.vi: Tôi thích hai khúc gỗ này.

samples.pinyin: guòle zhè tiáo jiē jiù dàole.
samples.en: Once you cross this street, you're there.
samples.vi: Đi qua con phố này là tới rồi.

samples.pinyin: tāmen dàizhe háizi guò hé.
samples.en: They crossed the river with their child.
samples.vi: Bọn họ dắt con qua sông.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ de dì sì gè xiàngmù.
samples.en: This is my fourth project.
samples.vi: Đây là dự án thứ tư của tôi.

samples.pinyin: tā shì dì sān gè dàodá de.
samples.en: He was the third to arrive.

samples.pinyin: qǐng zài hónglǜdēng qián tíngchē.
samples.en: Please stop at the traffic light.
samples.vi: Vui lòng dừng xe trước đèn giao thông.

samples.pinyin: nàlǐ yǒu méiyǒu hónglǜdēng?
samples.en: Is there a traffic light there?
samples.vi: Ở đó có đèn giao thông không?

samples.pinyin: qǐng xiān gàosù wǒ rénshù.
samples.en: Please tell me the number of people first.
samples.vi: Hãy nói với tôi số người trước.

samples.pinyin: qǐng gàosù wǒ nǐ dì dìzhǐ.
samples.en: Please tell me your address.
samples.vi: Nói với tôi địa chỉ của cậu.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xūyào zhǎodào tí kuǎn jī.
samples.en: I need to find an ATM.

samples.pinyin: tí kuǎn jī jiù zài yínháng ménkǒu.
samples.en: The ATM is right at the bank entrance.

samples.pinyin: wǒ zài chāo shāng mǎi kā fēi le
samples.en: I'm buying coffee at the convenience store.

samples.pinyin: wǒ jīn tiān qù chāo shāng mǎi yǐn liào
samples.en: I went to the supermarket today to buy drinks.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ yīnggāi zuò de.
samples.en: This is what I should do.
samples.vi: Đây là việc tôi nên làm mà.

samples.pinyin: nǐ yīnggāi zǎodiǎn qǐchuáng.
samples.en: You should get up earlier.
samples.vi: Bạn nên dậy sớm hơn chút.

samples.pinyin: zuótiān tā qùle yóujú.
samples.en: He went to the post office yesterday.

samples.pinyin: zánmen jǐ diǎn qù yóujú?
samples.en: What time shall we go to the post office?

samples.meaning: carry (in one's hand with the arm down)
samples.pinyin: wǒ qù tí yī hú shuǐ lái.
samples.en: I’m going to fetch a kettle of water.
samples.vi: Tôi đi xách một ấm nước đến.

samples.meaning: carry (in one's hand with the arm down)
samples.pinyin: tā shǒu lǐ tízhe shūbāo.
samples.en: He is holding a schoolbag in his hand.
samples.vi: Anh ta đang xách cặp sách.

samples.pinyin: nà bian de diàn yǐjīng guānménle.
samples.en: The shop over there has closed.
samples.vi: Cửa hàng đằng kia đã đóng cửa rồi.

samples.pinyin: nǐ kàn dào nà bian de māole ma?
samples.en: Did you see the cat over there?
samples.vi: Bạn có thấy con mèo bên đó không?

items.vi: Sư Đại (Đại học Sư phạm Đài Loan)

samples.pinyin: tā zài shī dà xuéxí jiàoyù xué.
samples.en: He studies education at Normal University.

samples.pinyin: shī dà shì wǒ mèngxiǎng de xuéxiào.
samples.en: Normal University is my dream school.

samples.pinyin: tā shì yīgè hépíng de rén.
samples.en: He is a peaceful person.

samples.pinyin: tā de tàidù fēicháng hépíng.
samples.en: His attitude is very peaceful.

samples.pinyin: qǐng dàjiā wǎng qián zhàn yí zhàn.
samples.en: Everybody please step forward.
samples.vi: Mời mọi người đứng về phía trước một chút.

samples.pinyin: huǒchē zhèngzài wǎng qián xíngshǐ.
samples.en: The train is moving forward.
samples.vi: Tàu hỏa đang chạy về phía trước.

samples.pinyin: qǐng zàixià gè lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn.
samples.en: Please turn right at the next intersection.

samples.pinyin: nǐ dào shízìlù kǒu hòu yòu zhuǎn.
samples.en: Turn right after you reach the intersection.

samples.pinyin: zhè shǒu gē tīng qǐlái hěn bēishāng.
samples.en: This song sounds very sad.
samples.vi: Bài hát này nghe rất buồn.

samples.sentence: 他的故事聽起來很有趣。
samples.pinyin: tā de gù shi tīng qǐlái hěn yǒuqù.
samples.en: His story sounds very interesting.
samples.vi: Câu chuyện của anh ấy nghe rất thú vị.

samples.pinyin: nǐ kànjiàn wǒ de bēizile ma?
samples.en: Have you seen my cup?
samples.vi: Bạn có thấy cốc của tôi chưa?

samples.pinyin: wǒmen dōu kànjiàn nàgè rénle.
samples.en: We all saw that person.

samples.pinyin: zhè zhāng túpiàn wúfǎ xiàzài.
samples.en: This image cannot be downloaded.

samples.sentence: 這個遊戲是從網上下載的。
samples.pinyin: zhège yóuxì shì cóng wǎngshàng xiàzài de.
samples.en: This game was downloaded from the internet.

samples.pinyin: wǒ yǒuyī zhāng shìjiè dìtú.

samples.pinyin: qiáng shàng guàzhe yī zhāng dìtú.
samples.en: There is a map hanging on the wall.
samples.vi: Trên tường treo một tấm bản đồ.

samples.pinyin: nǐ zhè bǎ yǔsǎn kě hǎo yòngle.
samples.en: Your umbrella is very practical.

samples.pinyin: tā mǎi de zhè bǎ dāo hěn hǎo yòng.
samples.en: The knife he bought is very useful.

samples.meaning: add to a verb or adjective to indicate a continued action or state
samples.pinyin: tā chuānzhe yī jiàn hóng yīfu.
samples.en: He is wearing a red shirt.

samples.meaning: add to a verb or adjective to indicate a continued action or state
samples.pinyin: tāmen xiàozhe zǒu jìn jiàoshì.
samples.en: They walked into the classroom smiling.

items.vi: nhu yếu phẩm / đồ dùng hàng ngày

samples.pinyin: wǒ xū yāo mǎi yīxiē rìyòngpǐn.

samples.pinyin: tā xǐhuan shōují rìyòngpǐn.
samples.en: She likes to collect daily necessities.

samples.sentence: 從廣州去北京要經過武漢。

samples.en: To travel from Guangzhou to Beijing, you have to pass through Wuhan.

samples.sentence: 從我傢到公司經過一所學校。

samples.pinyin: tā cóng xiàngzi lǐ zǒu chūlái.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xiànzài gǎnjué hěn è.

samples.pinyin: wǒ yǒudiǎn èle, xiǎng chīfàn.

samples.sentence: 這塊木料有一邊不光滑。

samples.sentence: 兩方麵爭論，總有一邊理屈。

samples.pinyin: niúdùn fāxiàn wànyǒuyǐnlì.

samples.sentence: 他們髮/發現了一顆小行星。

samples.meaning: leave; part from; be away from; separate

samples.meaning: just right; just in time; just enough

samples.sentence: 最後，他們隻好接受平局的結果。

samples.pinyin: shùzhī shàng zhǎng mǎnle píngguǒ.

samples.pinyin: wǒ hěn xǐhuan zhè zhī máobǐ.

samples.pinyin: suàn de běn fēnchéng hěnduō bàn.

samples.sentence: 這棵植物的本非常結實。

samples.en: The root of this plant is very strong.

samples.pinyin: lián běnzi yīgòng 120 kuài qián.

samples.sentence: 請填寫結算本子上的金額。

samples.pinyin: xià gè jiāotōng dēng zuǒ zhuǎn.

samples.pinyin: cǐ lù bù tōng.
samples.en: Not a Through Road.

samples.sentence: 路漫漫其脩遠兮, 吾將上下而求索。(屈原《離騷》)
samples.pinyin: lù mànmàn qí xiū yuǎn xī, wú jiāng shàng-xià ér qiú suǒ.
samples.en: The road ahead is long and far; I will search high and low with unyielding pursuit.

samples.sentence: 我在商店買了很多東西。
samples.pinyin: wǒ zài shāngdiàn mǎile hěnduō dōngxi.
